name: The Fabled Abanc
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>轟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アバンク
desc: If this card is in your GY: You can discard 1 "Fabled" monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "The Fabled Abanc" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your GY: You can discard 1 "Fabled" monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "The Fabled Abanc" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your GY: You can discard 1 "Fabled" monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "The Fabled Abanc" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
